texto: If you are working with authors, you are accepting a great responsibility and must tread very carefully. The author's work is a part of herself, a creative endeavor she has poured her heart and soul into. Protecting and nurturing that work and the author is part of the job of a publisher.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Terena Scott sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “If you are working with authors, you are accepting a great responsibility and must tread very car…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, advice-to-beginners, authors, útil em momentos de termino e trabalho.

frase_original: If you are working with authors, you are accepting a great responsibility and must tread very carefully. The author's work is a part of herself, a creative endeavor she has poured her heart and soul into. Protecting and nurturing that work and the author is part of the job of a publisher.
